Code fragment: return binding.like(likeExpression.value());
Explanation: The LIKE pattern is constructed from user input (likeExpression.value()) without any indication of whether it's a prefix search or full-text search with wildcards. Consider using a full-text search index (e.g., PostgreSQL's tsvector/tsquery) if this is intended for text searching, or validate that the pattern only allows prefix matching (e.g., 'term%').
